caption: A person's hands hold up a graded sports card encased in a clear plastic holder, showcasing a baseball player in a grey Houston jersey. The person tilts and rotates the card to show its reflective surfaces and the signature on the front. In the background, a person wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap is visible in a smaller inset window. The setting appears to be a workspace with various boxes and equipment. Prominent on-screen text and logos include "SPYS" and "SEBREAKS" in large white letters, along with a smaller logo that reads "CASEBREAKS.com". Across the sequence, the card is moved from a slight angle to a more direct front-facing view, reflecting light as it shifts. The background remains constant, featuring the inset person and the branded text across the bottom of the screen.
